title: One Door 315L Silver Rz32M72407F Sg
features: Compressor optimized to save energy and last long

Enjoy greater energy efficiency, less noise and a long-lasting performance. Unlike conventional compressors, which just start and stop, the Digital Inverter Compressor automatically adjusts its speed in response to cooling demand across 7 levels. As a result, it’s much quieter and uses significantly less power*. It also reduces wear and tear, so it is certified to keep working like new for 21 years*. And, for added peace of mind, it is backed up by 20 year warranty**(limited to the compressor only), longest in the industry.

Has a large capacity, but in a Cabinet Fit design that will fit harmoniously into your existing kitchen. There’s plenty of room to store your weekly grocery shopping, and it’s much easier to keep everything neatly and efficiently organized, so you can quickly find and take out the things you need.

No frost technology enchances the circulation of air to maintain a constant temperature in every corner of the refrigerator, which prevents the build up of frost and ice. It also reaches the target temperature much faster, increases the cooling systems durability, and avoids wasting power on defrost.

The All-around Cooling system continually monitors any temperature fluctuation and cools the fridge evenly from corner to corner. Cold air is blown out through multiple vents on every shelf level to create a multi-directional airflow, so it maintains a constant temperature and food stays fresher.

Delivers a rapid cooling performance to chill beverages and create ice. At the touch of a button, Power Cool blows intensely cold air into the fridge, so food and drinks are quickly chilled. And Power Freeze is great for freezing or firming up frozen food, like ice cream, and making more ice.

A Flat & Cabinet Fit design creates a completely harmonious look that upgrades your whole kitchen. It fits seamlessly with the surface of your existing furniture, and it’s flat front doesn’t stick out, so you can freely open the door and use the drawers without being obstructed by the side wall.

The high efficiency, long lasting LED lighting in the top of the freezer compartment is brighter and more power-efficient than conventional lighting. It illuminates every corner, so it’s much easier to see and find ingredients, and saves money on your electricity bills.
Specially made to store much more lamb

Enjoy the flexibility to store more lamb meat. Use it as a fridge(1~7℃) or freezer(-23~-15℃) for everyday food storage, or switch to Lamb Freeze Mode (-23℃) during celebrations. With 4 big drawers, it preserves a large quantity of lamb at the optimal temperature, so it retains the best flavor.
